name: Marvelous Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add mashed bananas; mix until smooth.
4. Stir in eggs.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour and baking soda.
6. Alternately add the flour mixture and buttermilk to the banana mixture, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix after each addition.
7. Stir in vanilla, bourbon, and pecans.
8. Pour batter into 3 greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in pans for 10 minutes; remove from pans and let cool completely on wire racks.
11. Spread Banana-Nut Frosting between layers and on top of cake.
Yield: one 3-layer cake
Banana Cupcakes:
1. Spoon batter into paper-lined muffin cups, filling each cup two-thirds full.
2. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes.
3. Remove from pans and let cool on wire racks.
4. Frost with Banana-Nut Frosting.
Yield: 4 dozen
